title: Adda247 Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Adda247 Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Adda247 Global Group family as a Subject Matter Expert in Patna. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Adda247 Global Group:
Adda247 Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247 Global Group!
